message:
fix(codegen): Migrate recursive.zig to builder API

Migrated all 16 emit calls to ZigBuilder API:
- Struct declaration → builder with flush
- Capture variables loop → builder per iteration with flush
- Function signature → builder with flush
- Var copies for reassigned params → builder per iteration with flush
- Closing braces → separate builders with flushes
- Initialize capture variables → builder per iteration with flush

Pattern used:
- const bN = try self.getBuilder() (separate builder per section)
- Write strings: try b.write(), try b.writeIndent(), try b.writeFmt()
- Flush immediately after each section: b.getBody() → self.output.appendSlice()
- Multiple flushes needed because function generates mixed output:
  * Struct definition (outer scope)
  * Function body (calls generateStmt which writes to self.output)
  * Struct closing + initialization (outer scope)

Key insight: This file interleaves builder output with direct
self.output writes (generateStmt), so we flush builder after each
section to maintain proper ordering.

Tests: unary 13/13, longexp 1/1 ✅

Progress: 9/47 statement files migrated
